description_long: This shotgun features a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly, paired with a wooden full stock and foregrip. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity design. The metal components have a matte, slightly worn finish, while the wood exhibits a rich, polished brown tone with visible grain. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall build is compact and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments. The design is reminiscent of tactical or riot shotguns, emphasizing durability and rapid fire capability.
description: A compact, metal-and-wood shotgun with a drum magazine and a full wooden stock, featuring a matte finish and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the barrel and the drum magazine directly beneath, with the wooden stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full wooden stock, drum magazine, and the length of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the drum magazine visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with the trigger guard and magazine more clearly defined.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
